task.title: Temporarily configuring a device to accept all traffic

context.p: You can use the ip utility to temporarily configure a network device to accept all traffic regardless of the MAC addresses.

step.cmd: Optional: Display the network interfaces to identify the one for which you want to receive all traffic:

info.codeblock: # ip address show 1: enp1s0: <NO-CARRIER,BROADCAST,MULTICAST,UP> mtu 1500 qdisc fq_codel state DOWN group default qlen 1000 link/ether 98:fa:9b:a4:34:09 brd ff:ff:ff:ff:ff:ff ...

step.cmd: Modify the device to enable or disable this property:

li.p: To enable the accept-all-mac-addresses mode for enp1s0:
li.codeblock: # ip link set enp1s0 promisc on

li.p: To disable the accept-all-mac-addresses mode for enp1s0:
li.codeblock: # ip link set enp1s0 promisc off

li.p: Verify that the accept-all-mac-addresses mode is enabled:
li.codeblock:
# ip link show enp1s0
1: enp1s0: <NO-CARRIER,BROADCAST,MULTICAST,PROMISC,UP> mtu 1500 qdisc fq_codel state DOWN mode DEFAULT group default qlen 1000 link/ether 98:fa:9b:a4:34:09 brd ff:ff:ff:ff:ff:ff
li.p: The PROMISC flag in the device description indicates that the mode is enabled.
